recipe.title: Korean Ground Beef over Sesame Rice
ingredients: 1.5 lb ground beef, 5 cloves garlic (minced), 1 tbsp fresh ginger (grated), 1/2 cup soy sauce, 2 tbsp brown sugar, 1 tbsp sesame oil, 2 tbsp rice vinegar, 1/4 cup water, 2 cups steamed white rice, 1 English cucumber (for pickles)
steps: Brown beef, drain fat. Add garlic and ginger, cook 1 minute. Add soy sauce, brown sugar, sesame oil, rice vinegar, and water. Simmer 8-10 minutes until sauce thickens. Make quick pickled cucumbers: slice cucumber thin, toss with vinegar, sesame oil, and sugar. Let sit 10 minutes. Serve beef over sesame rice, top with cucumbers and sesame seeds.
